reviews.comment:
Surtidores viejísimos. El nuestro no andaba y ni siquiera reorganizaron las filas. Perdimos 50 minutos, contra 10 de otras filas! No paren!!!

(Translated by Google)
Very old pumps. Ours wasn't working, and they didn't even rearrange the lines. We lost 50 minutes, compared to 10 for other lines! Don't stop!!!
